Stub functions for ambient light sensor operations in tests.

# Purpose
This code is a C++ header file that provides a narrow set of functions related to ambient light management. It includes function declarations for initializing the ambient light system ([`ambient_light_init`](<#ambient_light_init>)), retrieving the current light level ([`ambient_light_get_light_level`](<#ambient_light_get_light_level>)), reading ambient light sensor data ([`command_als_read`](<#command_als_read>)), and managing the dark threshold with [`ambient_light_get_dark_threshold`](<#ambient_light_get_dark_threshold>) and [`ambient_light_set_dark_threshold`](<#ambient_light_set_dark_threshold>). Additionally, it provides a function to check if the current light level is above the dark threshold ([`ambient_light_is_light`](<#ambient_light_is_light>)). The functions currently return default values or perform no operations, indicating that they serve as placeholders or stubs for future implementation.
